## Problem statement
What problem would this feature solve? (e.g., "I can't batch-process files from S3")

## Proposed solution
How would you like it to work? Include CLI examples if relevant.

```bash
# Example of desired behavior
aimf batch --input s3://bucket/*.aaud --verify

Alternative approaches

What have you considered? (e.g., "I tried using aws s3 cp first, but...")
Impact

    New user-facing CLI flag

    New API method

    Performance improvement

    Documentation change

    Other: _______

Additional context

    Mockups, links, references to similar tools

Would you implement this?

    Yes, I can submit a PR

    No, I'm just suggesting

    Maybe, I need guidance
